title: mespilus monogyna var. laciniata
intro: Mespilus monogyna var. laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved hawthorn or cut-leaved may, is a variety of hawthorn that is characterized by its deeply lobed or cut leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits of Mespilus monogyna var. laciniata include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support heart health.
